name: Project.Commander.Pattern.QtSignalFlagTimingRace_Pattern
observations: Qt signal synchronous execution creates timing races when signal emitted before dependent state changes complete. Emitter must complete state transitions BEFORE signal emission, or handler must delay state-dependent checks via QTimer.

Example: command_queue.py emits command_completed at line 372, but resets _is_processing flag 29 lines later (401-404). Handler checking is_processing immediately sees stale True value, causing deferred execution to fail.
Solution: QTimer.singleShot(50-100ms) in handler delays check until state transition completes. Pattern precedent at node_tree_presenter.py line 411 for sequential processing.

name: Project.Commander.Method.CheckAndExecutePendingBsTool_Method
observations: Helper method in NodeTreePresenter performing delayed check of _pending_bstool dict and command_queue.is_processing state. Called via QTimer.singleShot(50) from handle_command_completed().
Handles 29-line timing gap in command_queue.py _handle_worker_finished() where command_completed signal emitted before _is_processing flag reset. 50ms delay ensures flag transition completes.
Early return guards: checks _pending_bstool exists, verifies queue.is_processing==False before calling _execute_pending_bstool(). Logs all paths for debugging.

name: Project.Commander.Feature.BsToolTimingRaceFix_Feature
observations: Fixes BsTool deferred execution failure caused by Qt signal/flag timing race. command_completed signal emitted 29 lines before _is_processing flag reset, causing immediate is_processing check to fail.

Implementation: Modified handle_command_completed() to use QTimer.singleShot(50, _check_and_execute_pending_bstool) when _pending_bstool exists. New helper method performs delayed check after flag reset completes.
Pattern follows existing precedent at line 411 for sequential processing continuation (QTimer.singleShot(100)). 50ms delay sufficient for 28-line code execution in _handle_worker_finished().
Integration: Works with existing deferred execution pattern from Oct 2024. No changes to command_queue.py, _execute_pending_bstool(), or _handle_bstool_completed().
Testing: Syntax validated via py_compile. Manual integration test required due to PyQt DLL environment issues. User should verify Print Commands workflow executes FBC→RPC→BsTool sequentially.
